name: gemini-kudosity-sms-extension
description: Send SMS and MMS messages, manage contact lists, and configure webhooks using the Kudosity messaging platform.

settings.name: API Key
settings.description: Your Kudosity API key from Developers → API Settings. Used for V2 API (x-api-key header) and as part of V1 Basic Auth.

settings.name: API Secret
settings.description: Your Kudosity API secret from Developers → API Settings. Used for V1 API Basic Auth (base64-encoded with API Key).

kudosity.description: Kudosity API documentation and endpoint metadata server. Read-only — does not execute API operations or access credentials.
